fields.admin_requirements: Summary admin surfaces can select a built-in model, configure the llama.cpp runtime binding, and inspect the managed runtime service/probe state.
fields.public_requirements: No direct public interface; summarization updates internal displays.
fields.service_requirements: Requires the summary command/task pipeline, LCD and Celery node features, and an Arthexis-managed local model runtime backed by a selected llama.cpp model.
fields.summary: Controls automated LCD summary generation, model selection, and the managed local llama.cpp runtime service settings.
